arts.ttl: Team quits Galatasaray game in penalty protest
arts.sum: Adana Demirspor players walk off the pitch at Galatasaray in protest at a penalty awarded against them.

Since their entertaining 4-3 loss to Ferencvaros last month, AZ have won three on the spin. AZ have won eight of their last nine at home coming into Thursday's game against Galatasaray, which includes...
